hello: Hi there! How can I help you today?
what is your name?: I am a simple rule-based chatbot.
how are you?: I'm doing great, thank you for asking!
good morning: Good morning! Hope you're having a great start to your day.
good afternoon: Good afternoon! How can I assist you today?
good evening: Good evening! What can I help you with tonight?
yo: Yo! What can I do for you?
help: I'm here to help! What do you need assistance with?
can you help me: Absolutely! Let me know what you need and I'll do my best.
what can you do: I can answer basic questions about our hours, location, or guide you to support.
thank you: You're very welcome! Let me know if you need anything else.
thanks: No problem at all! Happy to help.
